prompt: Create a bold retro Japanese kaiju movie poster featuring a gigantic furious city cat as the central monster. Vertical poster composition, black background with a limited screen-print palette of golden yellow, tomato red, teal blue, cream, and deep black, with thick ink outlines, halftone/grain texture, high contrast, and vintage propaganda/comic-book styling. At the top, place huge blocky yellow Japanese-style date text reading 7月22日 across the left and center, a large yellow kanji 東 on the upper right, and a stacked English slogan beside it reading THE CAT IS KING OF THE CITY.. The main subject is one enormous tabby cat standing upright in the center, mouth wide open roaring with sharp fangs and red tongue, yellow eyes, pink nose, whiskers, both front paws raised like claws, visible paw pads, white belly and feet, striped multicolor fur in teal, red, yellow, cream, and black, and a curled striped tail on the right. Behind the cat, show a burning city skyline with exactly 14 visible black-and-red buildings of varying height, yellow window grids, and flames rising around them. Add dramatic red and yellow flame shapes and teardrop sparks around the cat. Along the bottom foreground, include exactly 9 small black human silhouettes fleeing in panic: 4 on the left side of the cat, 4 on the right side, and 1 tiny figure near the center distance. Use forced perspective so the cat towers over the city and people. Keep the design flat, posterized, centered, symmetrical, explosive, and theatrical, with no photorealism and no extra logos or watermarks.
